hero_title: Technology, Transformation, and the People Navigating Both
hero_tagline: Writing on enterprise AI and commercial growth — from someone with the track record to close it, build the team, and ship it.
intro_bio: Twenty years inside APAC's most demanding digital programs — Estée Lauder, Shiseido, Microsoft, Merkle. Managing Director, Hong Kong. In 2024 I started building AI products from scratch. The gap between what I expected and what I found is what I write about.
